nodes.name: 褐翅鸦鹃
nodes.summary: 褐翅鸦鹃（Greater coucal，学名 Centropus sinensis），分类上属于鹃形目，并归入杜鹃科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 埃尔温·施特雷泽曼
nodes.summary: 埃尔温·施特雷泽曼是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括褐翅鸦鹃，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: 艾伦·奥克塔文·休姆
nodes.summary: 艾伦·奥克塔文·休姆是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括白颊山鹧鸪、褐翅鸦鹃、Andaman nightjar，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鹃形目
nodes.summary: 鹃形目（Cuculiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联148种鸟类，如圭拉鹃、Greater ani、滑嘴犀鵑等148种鸟类。

nodes.name: 康厄安群島
nodes.summary: 康厄安群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括褐翅鸦鹃、Cave swiftlet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 托马斯·霍斯菲尔德
nodes.summary: 托马斯·霍斯菲尔德是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括栗树鸭、褐翅鸦鹃，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 杜鹃科
nodes.summary: 杜鹃科（Cuculidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联147种鸟类，如圭拉鹃、Greater ani、滑嘴犀鵑等147种鸟类。

links.key: bird-褐翅鸦鹃-39b77ea8__distributed_in__loc-埃尔温-施特雷泽曼-fdab5650
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |year=2005 |title= The Cuckoos |publisher= Oxford University Press|isbn= 0-19-850213-3 |pages=238–242}} * Race parroti Stresemann, 1913 — found in Peninsular India (Maharashtra, Madhya Pradesh, Orissa and southwards)

links.key: bird-褐翅鸦鹃-39b77ea8__distributed_in__loc-艾伦-奥克塔文-休姆-bdea3a13
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The upper back is black and the juvenile has unbarred wings. * Race intermedius Hume, 1873 — smaller in size and found in Bangladesh, west Cachar and into Myanmar and the Chin Hills into China (Yunnan, Hainan), Thailand, Indochina and the northern part of the Malay Peninsula. * Race bubutus Horsfield, 1821 — found in the southern part of the Malay Peninsula into the islands of Sumatra, Nias, Mentawai Islands, Java, Bali, Borneo, western Philippines (Balabac, Cagayan Sulu and Palawan)

links.key: bird-褐翅鸦鹃-39b77ea8__distributed_in__loc-托马斯-霍斯菲尔德-0d750b27
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The upper back is black and the juvenile has unbarred wings. * Race intermedius Hume, 1873 — smaller in size and found in Bangladesh, west Cachar and into Myanmar and the Chin Hills into China (Yunnan, Hainan), Thailand, Indochina and the northern part of the Malay Peninsula. * Race bubutus Horsfield, 1821 — found in the southern part of the Malay Peninsula into the islands of Sumatra, Nias, Mentawai Islands, Java, Bali, Borneo, western Philippines (Balabac, Cagayan Sulu and Palawan)

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The wing is paler rufous in this race. * Race anonymus Stresemann, 1913 — found in the southwestern Philippines (Basilan, Sulu Islands) and is shorter and darker winged than bubutus. * Race kangeangensis Vorderman, 1893 — found in the Kangean Islands
